description_long: This adult pedestrian is dressed in a sleeveless zip-up vest with a gradient pattern and a bold graphic on the back, paired with fitted pants featuring a skeleton bone print along the legs. The individual wears a tight-fitting hood or balaclava that covers the head and most of the face, leaving only the eyes exposed. The arms are bare, and the hands are relaxed at the sides. On the feet are open-toed sandals, contrasting with the otherwise urban and edgy attire. The overall appearance suggests a streetwise or alternative style, possibly for casual or subcultural urban environments. The figure's build is average, and the posture is upright and alert.
description: An adult wearing a sleeveless vest, skeleton-print pants, a hooded face covering, and sandals, standing upright with arms at the sides. The look is urban and distinctive, with bold graphics and a streetwise vibe.
description_view_0: Front view shows the sleeveless vest, skeleton-print pants, face covering, and sandals, with arms relaxed at the sides.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the hood, the fit of the vest and pants, and the open-toed sandals.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the bold graphic on the back of the vest and the full skeleton print on the back of the pants.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the side profile of the hood, vest, and pants.
attribute_clothing_type: sleeveless zip-up vest, fitted graphic pants, hooded face covering
